ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a comedy classic and a benchmark for the genre. Referenced in the David Zucker AMA announcement and user comments praising its humor.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended and discussed as a successful studio comedy. Users mentioned seeing it multiple times in theaters and praised its humor in the context of comedy's potential comeback.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a prime example of a British horror-comedy. Users specifically requested similar 'offbeat/quirky' UK comedies and it was suggested for a fun horror-comedy movie night.

ranked_movies.title: What We Do in the Shadows
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a 'masterpiece of a show' and listed as a pre-watched example of a successful horror-comedy for a movie night.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended multiple times as a go-to fun horror comedy, described as a 'classic' in the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Extreme Job
ranked_movies.reason: The most recommended Korean comedy film. Mentioned by multiple users as a guaranteed laugh and the second highest-grossing film in Korea.

ranked_movies.title: My Sassy Girl
ranked_movies.reason: A frequently recommended classic Korean comedy film, mentioned by several users in the dedicated Korean comedy thread.

ranked_movies.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
ranked_movies.reason: Listed in the original request for 80s/90s/2000s family comedies and served as the benchmark for the recommendations that followed.

ranked_movies.title: Home Alone
ranked_movies.reason: A staple family comedy from the era requested, consistently mentioned alongside other classics like Mrs. Doubtfire and Matilda.

ranked_movies.title: The Hangover
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as an example of a past successful studio comedy franchise, though also cited as an example of bloated budgets that hurt the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Withnail and I
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a quintessential 'offbeat' British comedy, with users quoting iconic lines and calling it their favorite film.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: While a horror film, it was passionately discussed in the context of the Oscars snubbing great performances in genre films, specifically Toni Collette's lack of a nomination.

ranked_movies.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of a lengthy discussion thread comparing its comedic and sexualized tone to the original novel, making it one of the most debated films across the provided posts.

ranked_movies.title: Idle Hands
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a fun horror-comedy choice for a movie night.

ranked_movies.title: The Frighteners
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a great horror-comedy starring Michael J. Fox, with a unique premise that blends scares and laughs.

ranked_movies.title: Uncle Buck
ranked_movies.reason: A top recommendation in the 80s/90s family comedy request thread.

ranked_movies.title: Miss Granny
ranked_movies.reason: A popular and frequently recommended Korean comedy film described as 'silly and sweet'.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Cited by a user as a movie so funny it brought them to tears, highlighting its hilarious moments.

ranked_movies.title: BASEketball
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a formative comedy from David Zucker's filmography in the AMA announcement thread.
